nasb.text: and the lamp of God had not yet gone out, and Samuel was lying down in the temple of the Lord where the ark of God was,

esv.text: The lamp of God had not yet gone out, and Samuel was lying down in the temple of the Lord, where the ark of God was.

cnv.text: 神的燈還沒有熄滅，撒母耳躺臥在耶和華的殿中，就是安放　神約櫃的地方。

ccb.text: 上帝的灯还没有熄灭，撒母耳睡在耶和华的殿内，即安放上帝约柜的地方。
